title: iPhone 7 Plus : Portrait Mode
content: OK. iOS 10.1 is out. So I took a couple of shots to give Portrait Mode a try. But since I rarely meet human, this is the best I can do. ( _Photos are taken right off the camera, no adjustment._ ) [caption id="attachment_4893" align="aligncenter" width="1620"] Portrait Mode : Good[/caption] [caption id="attachment_4892" align="aligncenter" width="1620"] Portrait Mode : Not Quite Good (Low Light)[/caption] [caption id="attachment_4898" align="aligncenter" width="1728"] Cat-trait Mode[/caption] Overall I would say, Portrait Mode is good.
